name: Franklin D. Roosevelt
title: Franklin D. Roosevelt - taken 4/11/45 died the next day on 4/12/45, 63
description: Franklin D. Roosevelt - taken 4/11/45 died the next day on 4/12/45, 63
bio: Franklin D. Roosevelt was the 32nd President of the United States, serving an unprecedented four terms. He led the country through the Great Depression and World War II with his New Deal programs and Allied leadership.
